user.title: Connect to Fuse Energy
user.description: Enter your Fuse Energy account email address.

otp.title: Enter verification code
otp.description: Enter the code sent to your phone by Fuse Energy ({email}).

magic_link.title: Magic link verification
magic_link.description:
Fuse Energy sent a magic link to **{email}**.

1. Open the email on a **desktop browser** (not your phone)
2. **Right-click** the magic link → **Copy link address**
3. Paste the full URL below

The URL will look like: `https://www.fuseenergy.com/...?token=...`

data.magic_link_url: Magic link URL (paste the full URL)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Fuse Energy
reauth_confirm.description: Your Fuse Energy session has expired. Click Submit to send a new link/code to {email}.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or verification code / link token.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Fuse Energy. Check your network and that api.fuseenergy.com is not blocked by DNS/Pi-hole.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the HA logs for details.
error.no_premises: No premises found for this account.

abort.already_configured: This Fuse Energy account is already configured.
